color: rgb(31, 60, 136) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 用户发起问题

div.style: color: rgb(19, 90, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
输入数据
query 和 session_id

div.style: color: rgb(19, 90, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
历史数据
history 和 MongoDB

div.style: color: rgb(19, 90, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
商品库
kb_item_names

div.style: color: rgb(19, 90, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
检索结果
kb_chunks web_chunks kg_chunks

div.style: color: rgb(19, 90, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
返回结果
answer done_list sources confidence

div.style: color: rgb(45, 34, 90) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
1 任务规划
Planner
输出 intent_type task_type selected_tools need_clarify

div.style: color: rgb(45, 34, 90) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
2 商品确认
ItemConfirm
输出 item_names rewritten_query confirmation_mode

div.style: color: rgb(107, 78, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
是否已经生成澄清问题
或者候选确认问题

div.style: color: rgb(45, 34, 90) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
3 工具路由
ToolRouter
输出 run_embedding run_hyde run_web run_kg

div.style: color: rgb(45, 34, 90) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
4 多路检索
Embedding HyDE Web KG

div.style: color: rgb(45, 34, 90) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
5 融合与精排
Join RRF Rerank

div.style: color: rgb(45, 34, 90) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
6 证据反思
Reflection
输出 evidence_status missing_facts confidence

div.style: color: rgb(107, 78, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
证据是否不足并且
仍允许继续补检索

div.style: color: rgb(45, 34, 90) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
7 动态补检索
DynamicRetrieval
输出 followup_query 和新 selected_tools

div.style: color: rgb(45, 34, 90) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
8 最终输出
AnswerOutput
输出 直答 澄清 保守回答 拒答

div.style: color: rgb(17, 94, 89) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 结束
